0.7.0a4_FilesystemMiddleware_tool_allowl.key_ship: Add a filesystem tool allowlist to FilesystemMiddleware, so callers can expose only selected built-in filesystem tools while keeping read_file available and leaving custom user tools unaffected

0.7.0a6_NVIDIA_Nemotron_3_Ultra_harness_.layer: Layer 2 (Harness) 1:N 跨 6 vendor 1st-party primitive — R693 核心 ship
0.7.0a6_NVIDIA_Nemotron_3_Ultra_harness_.key_ship: Add a built-in NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra harness profile across NVIDIA/ChatNVIDIA, Baseten, Fireworks, OpenRouter, Nebius, and Together. The profile adds model-specific prompt guidance, provider compatibility shims, text-tool-call repair, reasoning-tag cleanup, filesystem retry handling, rate-limit retries, loop-control nudges, and final-answer guards for agentic workloads without changing other models on those providers

0.0.9_Agent_Protocol_interrupt_state_rea.key_ship: acp: defer interrupt state reads until stream closes (#4542)

0.0.3_talon_video_frame_extraction.key_ship: sdk: optional video frame extraction on read_file (#4094) + talon: add Fleet zip import command (#4493)

r697_outcome.article_topic: Hybrid Runtime R697 openwiki 9188 27th Sustained + post-BREAK baseline ~42.5 稳定 + Anthropic Quick Steady cadence 中断 + R696 Quiet Window 重新解读双重验证 — openwiki 9,188 ⭐ (R696 9,105 → R697 9,188, +83 in 1h57min ~42.5/h),post-BREAK rate/h baseline 跨 4 rounds 收敛到 ~42.5 (R694 38.5 → R695 30 → R696 40 → R697 42.5),比 9k⭐ BREAK 前的 38.5/h 高 +10.4%,Hybrid Runtime OSS Momentum 略微增强。9k⭐ SUSTAINED 缓冲 +188 ⭐ 扩大 8x (R696 +105 → R697 +188),27th Sustained cluster signal (R669-R697 持续 29 rounds),10k⭐ SUSTAINED 预测窗口从 R696 的 R705-R712 缩短到 R702-R710。同步 Anthropic Quick Steady cadence 中断:R696 ship v0.3.204 + v0.2.113 后 ~3.5h 无新 ship (v0.3.205+ 未 ship),Phase 6 trigger 3 从 R696 的'部分命中 (parity tracking)' 降级到 R697 的'未命中 (cadence 中断)',最可能原因是 Claude Code 主版本 v2.1.205 未 ship。3-vendor Quiet Window 重新延长:OpenAI v0.18.0/v0.13.0 Quiet Window 翻倍到 ~46h + LangChain DeepAgents 0.7.0a6 Quiet Window 翻倍到 ~32.7h + Anthropic Quick Steady cadence 中断。R696 Quiet Window 4 解读概率重校:解读 1 (Phase 5 沉淀期) 从 ~25% 上调到 ~35-40%,解读 2 (过渡期短暂调整) 从 ~70% 下调到 ~55-60%,新增解读 5 (3-vendor 节奏非同步 rhythmic desynchronization) ~5%。Phase 6 trigger 1 (Runtime Spec article) 仍未 ship,7 trigger 中 trigger 3 完全降级 + 其他 6 个仍未命中,Phase 6 Arc Segment 启动尚未确认,Phase 6 早期信号有所减弱 (Quick Steady cadence 中断)。

r697_outcome.core_thesis: Hybrid Runtime R697 openwiki 9188 27th Sustained + post-BREAK baseline ~42.5 稳定 + Anthropic Quick Steady cadence 中断 + R696 Quiet Window 重新解读双重验证 — openwiki 9,188 ⭐ (R696 9,105 → R697 9,188, +83 in 1h57min ~42.5/h),post-BREAK rate/h baseline 跨 4 rounds 收敛到 ~42.5 (R694 38.5 → R695 30 → R696 40 → R697 42.5),9k⭐ SUSTAINED 缓冲 +188 ⭐ 扩大 8x,27th Sustained cluster signal (R669-R697 持续 29 rounds),10k⭐ SUSTAINED 预测窗口从 R696 的 R705-R712 缩短到 R702-R710。Anthropic Quick Steady cadence 中断 (~3.5h 无新 ship),Phase 6 trigger 3 从 R696 部分命中降级到 R697 未命中。3-vendor Quiet Window 重新延长:OpenAI ~46h + LangChain ~32.7h + Anthropic cadence 中断。R696 Quiet Window 4 解读概率重校:解读 2 从 ~70% 下调到 ~55-60%,解读 1 从 ~25% 上调到 ~35-40%,新增解读 5 (3-vendor 节奏非同步) ~5%。

r698_outcome.article_topic: Hybrid Runtime R698 LangChain Harness 数据基底 1st-party 演进 ship + Layer 2 (Harness) 1:N 跨 3 维度 1st-party 演进信号 + Phase 6 trigger 1-7 全部仍未命中 (0 命中) + R697 Quiet Window 系统性高估重新校准 + openwiki post-BREAK baseline 41.5/h 持续验证 — LangChain R698 trigger 前 13h ship "Improving Agents is a Data Mining Problem" (2026-07-07 23:05 CST, Harrison Chase 在 AI Engineer World Fair 2026 演讲延伸),把 Continual Learning / Harness Engineering / Post-Training 三者统一到"数据挖掘" substrate,这是 Layer 2 (Harness) 1:N 跨 3 维度 1st-party 演进的核心信号 (含 Sandwich Recipe "Harness Engineering → Fine-Tuning → Harness Engineering" + 13.7% lift on Terminal Bench 2.0 + LangSmith Engine + Trace Judge Model 1/100x cost vs frontier)。但 LangChain Harness 数据基底 ≠ Phase 6 Runtime Spec 标准化 (Harness 是 Layer 2 vendor 内部实践,Runtime Spec 是 Layer 4 跨 vendor 接口)。R698 trigger 同步实测:Phase 6 trigger 1 (1st-Party Runtime Spec article) 仍未 ship + Anthropic SDK Quick Steady cadence 中断持续 (~3.7h 无新 ship, v0.3.205+ 未 ship, Claude Code v2.1.205 未 ship → SDK parity tracking 没有目标) + 3-vendor Quiet Window 持续 (R697 重新校准:OpenAI ~22h 重校自 ~46h, LangChain DeepAgents ~24h 重校自 ~32.7h, Anthropic cadence 中断 ~3.7h) + openwiki 9,197 ⭐ (28th Sustained) post-BREAK baseline 41.5/h 持续验证 (R695 30 → R696 40 → R697 42.5 → R698 41.5, baseline 稳定在 40-43 范围)。R698 关键判断:Phase 6 trigger 1-7 全部仍未命中 (0 命中) + Phase 6 Arc Segment 启动需要 trigger 1 (Runtime Spec article) 命中。
r698_outcome.article_type: independent deep-dive (LangChain 1st-party 文章 ship + Layer 2 Harness 1:N 跨 3 维度 1st-party 演进 + 7 trigger 状态更新 + R697 Quiet Window 重新校准 + openwiki post-BREAK baseline 41.5/h 持续验证)

r698_outcome.core_thesis: Hybrid Runtime R698 LangChain "Improving Agents is a Data Mining Problem" 1st-party 文章 ship (2026-07-07 23:05 CST, R698 trigger 前 13h) + Layer 2 (Harness) 1:N 跨 3 维度 1st-party 演进信号 + Phase 6 trigger 1-7 全部仍未命中 (0 命中) + R697 Quiet Window 系统性高估重新校准 + openwiki 9,197 ⭐ 28th Sustained + post-BREAK baseline 41.5/h 持续验证 — openwiki 9,197 ⭐ (R697 9,188 → R698 9,197, +9 in 13min ≈ 41.5/h), post-BREAK rate/h baseline 跨 4 rounds 收敛到 40-43/h 范围, 9k⭐ SUSTAINED 缓冲扩大 8.6x 至 +197 ⭐, 28th Sustained cluster signal (R669-R698 持续 30 rounds), 10k⭐ SUSTAINED 预测窗口维持 R702-R710。LangChain R698 ship "Improving Agents is a Data Mining Problem" 把 Continual Learning / Harness Engineering / Post-Training 三者统一到"数据挖掘" substrate, Layer 2 (Harness) 1:N 跨 3 维度 1st-party 演进, 但不是 Layer 4 (Runtime Interface) 标准化, Phase 6 trigger 1 (Runtime Spec article) 仍未命中。R697 Quiet Window 系统性高估重新校准:OpenAI ~22h (重校自 ~46h) + LangChain DeepAgents ~24h (重校自 ~32.7h) + Anthropic cadence 中断 ~3.7h。Anthropic SDK cadence 中断持续 (~3.7h 无新 ship, v0.3.205+ 未 ship, Claude Code v2.1.205 未 ship → SDK parity tracking 没有目标)。7 trigger 中 0 个命中, Phase 6 Arc Segment 启动需要 trigger 1 (Runtime Spec article) 命中。
